blocks.body: Past Continuous: Time Expressions — at 7 p.m., at that moment, this time yesterday, while, when.

{"level":"A2","intro":"Words and expressions like at 7 p.m., at that moment, this time yesterday, while, when often point to Past Continuous.","rules":[{"label":"At + time","color":"emerald","text":"An exact time in the past often goes with an action in progress.","example":"I was studying at 7 p.m."},{"label":"This time yesterday","color":"blue","text":"This expression shows an action in progress at the same moment yesterday.","example":"This time yesterday, we were flying to Rome."},{"label":"While / When","color":"amber","text":"These words often connect a longer action in progress with another action or event.","example":"She was cooking while I was setting the table. / We were walking when it started to rain."}]}

{"title":"1. Useful time expressions","intro":"Start with the most common time markers for Past Continuous.","items":[{"label":"Exact moment","title":"at 7 p.m. / at midnight / at that moment","subtitle":"He was working at midnight."},{"label":"Yesterday","title":"this time yesterday","subtitle":"This time yesterday, I was sitting on the train."},{"label":"While","title":"while + longer action","subtitle":"She was reading while he was cooking."},{"label":"When","title":"when + another event","subtitle":"They were driving when the phone rang."}]}

{"title":"2. How these words work","sections":[{"label":"Exact moment in the past","color":"emerald","description":"At 7 p.m., at that moment, or at midnight show that the action was in progress at a particular time in the past.","examples":[{"en":"I was doing my homework at 7 p.m.","ua":"The action was still in progress at that time."},{"en":"She was talking to Tom at that moment.","ua":"The action was happening exactly then."}]},{"label":"Two actions in progress","color":"blue","description":"With while, we often show two actions happening at the same time.","examples":[{"en":"We were eating while they were dancing.","ua":"Two actions were in progress at the same time."},{"en":"He was studying while I was making dinner.","ua":"Parallel actions in the past."}]},{"label":"Action and event","color":"amber","description":"With when, we often connect a longer action in progress with a shorter event.","examples":[{"en":"I was walking home when it started to snow.","ua":"A longer action plus a short event."},{"en":"They were sleeping when the alarm rang.","ua":"The event interrupted or marked the moment."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Common combinations","intro":"See how time expressions work with Past Continuous.","rows":[{"en":"I was studying at 7 p.m.","ua":"an action in progress at an exact time","note":"at 7 p.m."},{"en":"This time yesterday, she was flying to Berlin.","ua":"the same moment yesterday","note":"this time yesterday"},{"en":"We were talking while they were waiting.","ua":"two parallel actions","note":"while"},{"en":"He was driving when the rain started.","ua":"a longer action plus an event","note":"when"}],"warning":"For a short finished event after when, Past Simple is often more natural than another Past Continuous form."}

{"title":"4. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Using Past Simple instead of an action in progress at a past moment.","wrong":"❌ I studied at 7 p.m. when the meaning is in progress.","right":"✅ I was studying at 7 p.m."},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Forgetting was / were before verb-ing.","wrong":"❌ They waiting at that moment.","right":"✅ They were waiting at that moment."},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Using the base form after was / were.","wrong":"❌ She was cook while I was cleaning.","right":"✅ She was cooking while I was cleaning."}]}

{"title":"5. Short summary","items":["at 7 p.m., at that moment, this time yesterday often show an action in progress in the past.","while often links two actions that were happening at the same time.","when often links a longer action in progress with a shorter event.","With these time markers, Past Continuous often sounds natural."]}
